en: In life, we often face problems, whether small or big, but remember one thing, avoiding problems
zh: In life, we often face problems, whether small or big, but remember one thing, avoiding problems
ja: In life, we often face problems, whether small or big, but remember one thing, avoiding problems

en: never solves them. In fact, they come back even bigger. Today's story will teach us that to
zh: never solves them. In fact, they come back even bigger. Today's story will teach us that to
ja: never solves them. In fact, they come back even bigger. Today's story will teach us that to

en: overcome fear, we need courage, and to solve problems, we must face them with the right mindset.
zh: overcome fear, we need courage, and to solve problems, we must face them with the right mindset.
ja: overcome fear, we need courage, and to solve problems, we must face them with the right mindset.

en: Let's take a valuable lesson from this story for our own lives.
zh: Let's take a valuable lesson from this story for our own lives.
ja: Let's take a valuable lesson from this story for our own lives.

en: Deep inside a forest, surrounded by green hills, there was a huge cave, a rabbit lived there.
zh: Deep inside a forest, surrounded by green hills, there was a huge cave, a rabbit lived there.
ja: Deep inside a forest, surrounded by green hills, there was a huge cave, a rabbit lived there.

en: This rabbit had a very kind heart, so all the animals in the forest loved him.
zh: This rabbit had a very kind heart, so all the animals in the forest loved him.
ja: This rabbit had a very kind heart, so all the animals in the forest loved him.

en: In times of trouble, he always stood by others and helped as much as he could.
zh: In times of trouble, he always stood by others and helped as much as he could.
ja: In times of trouble, he always stood by others and helped as much as he could.

en: One morning, the rabbit went out to look for food. He wished he could find some fresh fruit,
zh: One morning, the rabbit went out to look for food. He wished he could find some fresh fruit,
ja: One morning, the rabbit went out to look for food. He wished he could find some fresh fruit,

en: or maybe even a carrot. Carrots were his favorite. Eating only leaves every day had made
zh: or maybe even a carrot. Carrots were his favorite. Eating only leaves every day had made
ja: or maybe even a carrot. Carrots were his favorite. Eating only leaves every day had made

en: him very bored. Finding a carrot in that forest was almost impossible, but that day he was lucky.
zh: him very bored. Finding a carrot in that forest was almost impossible, but that day he was lucky.
ja: him very bored. Finding a carrot in that forest was almost impossible, but that day he was lucky.

en: Suddenly, he spotted one. Excited, the rabbit picked up the carrot. He thought instead of
zh: Suddenly, he spotted one. Excited, the rabbit picked up the carrot. He thought instead of
ja: Suddenly, he spotted one. Excited, the rabbit picked up the carrot. He thought instead of

en: eating it in the forest, he would take it back to his safe cave and enjoy it in peace.
zh: eating it in the forest, he would take it back to his safe cave and enjoy it in peace.
ja: eating it in the forest, he would take it back to his safe cave and enjoy it in peace.

en: That would make him even happier. But on the way back, trouble came.
zh: That would make him even happier. But on the way back, trouble came.
ja: That would make him even happier. But on the way back, trouble came.

en: Lost in his joy, he wasn't paying attention to the path. Suddenly, he slipped and almost fell
zh: Lost in his joy, he wasn't paying attention to the path. Suddenly, he slipped and almost fell
ja: Lost in his joy, he wasn't paying attention to the path. Suddenly, he slipped and almost fell

en: into the river's current. Luckily, he caught hold of a tree root and saved himself.
zh: into the river's current. Luckily, he caught hold of a tree root and saved himself.
ja: into the river's current. Luckily, he caught hold of a tree root and saved himself.

en: But the carrot slipped from his hand and fell straight into the water.
zh: But the carrot slipped from his hand and fell straight into the water.
ja: But the carrot slipped from his hand and fell straight into the water.

en: Terrified, the rabbit ran along the riverbank, hoping the carrot might get stuck somewhere.
zh: Terrified, the rabbit ran along the riverbank, hoping the carrot might get stuck somewhere.
ja: Terrified, the rabbit ran along the riverbank, hoping the carrot might get stuck somewhere.

en: But no, the carrot floated away and disappeared forever under a deep waterfall.
zh: But no, the carrot floated away and disappeared forever under a deep waterfall.
ja: But no, the carrot floated away and disappeared forever under a deep waterfall.

en: Exhausted and heartbroken, he had no energy left to search for more food.
zh: Exhausted and heartbroken, he had no energy left to search for more food.
ja: Exhausted and heartbroken, he had no energy left to search for more food.

en: He just wanted to go back to his cave and rest. But as he reached the entrance,
zh: He just wanted to go back to his cave and rest. But as he reached the entrance,
ja: He just wanted to go back to his cave and rest. But as he reached the entrance,

en: his chest tightened. For the first time, fear ran through his whole body. His throat went dry
zh: his chest tightened. For the first time, fear ran through his whole body. His throat went dry
ja: his chest tightened. For the first time, fear ran through his whole body. His throat went dry

en: and with the shaky voice he called, who has entered my cave. No answer came.
zh: and with the shaky voice he called, who has entered my cave. No answer came.
ja: and with the shaky voice he called, who has entered my cave. No answer came.

en: Summoning more courage, he shouted louder.
zh: Summoning more courage, he shouted louder.
ja: Summoning more courage, he shouted louder.

en: Answer me. Suddenly, a thunderous voice echoed from inside.
zh: Answer me. Suddenly, a thunderous voice echoed from inside.
ja: Answer me. Suddenly, a thunderous voice echoed from inside.

en: I am the one who breaks a rhino's bones and crushes an elephant into dust.
zh: I am the one who breaks a rhino's bones and crushes an elephant into dust.
ja: I am the one who breaks a rhino's bones and crushes an elephant into dust.

en: The rabbit trembled with fear and stepped back. He thought,
zh: The rabbit trembled with fear and stepped back. He thought,
ja: The rabbit trembled with fear and stepped back. He thought,

en: How can a small creature like me fight such a powerful beast?
zh: How can a small creature like me fight such a powerful beast?
ja: How can a small creature like me fight such a powerful beast?

en: Just then, a wolf happened to pass by. The rabbit begged,
zh: Just then, a wolf happened to pass by. The rabbit begged,
ja: Just then, a wolf happened to pass by. The rabbit begged,

en: Oh friend wolf, please help me. A terrible creature has taken over my cave.
zh: Oh friend wolf, please help me. A terrible creature has taken over my cave.
ja: Oh friend wolf, please help me. A terrible creature has taken over my cave.

en: Can you drive it out?
zh: Can you drive it out?
ja: Can you drive it out?

en: The wolf, full of confidence, said,
zh: The wolf, full of confidence, said,
ja: The wolf, full of confidence, said,

en: Of course. All animals, big or small. Listen to me. He proudly walked to the cave and growled
zh: Of course. All animals, big or small. Listen to me. He proudly walked to the cave and growled
ja: Of course. All animals, big or small. Listen to me. He proudly walked to the cave and growled

en: loudly. But again, the frightening voice boomed. I am the one who breaks a rhino's bones and crushes
zh: loudly. But again, the frightening voice boomed. I am the one who breaks a rhino's bones and crushes
ja: loudly. But again, the frightening voice boomed. I am the one who breaks a rhino's bones and crushes

en: an elephant into dust. The wolf shivered in fear and stepped back. I can't handle this rabbit.
zh: an elephant into dust. The wolf shivered in fear and stepped back. I can't handle this rabbit.
ja: an elephant into dust. The wolf shivered in fear and stepped back. I can't handle this rabbit.

en: Forgive me, he said and ran to hide in the bushes.
zh: Forgive me, he said and ran to hide in the bushes.
ja: Forgive me, he said and ran to hide in the bushes.

en: Next, a tiger arrived. The rabbit explained everything and asked for help.
zh: Next, a tiger arrived. The rabbit explained everything and asked for help.
ja: Next, a tiger arrived. The rabbit explained everything and asked for help.

en: Since the rabbit had once helped the tiger before, the tiger said, Don't worry.
zh: Since the rabbit had once helped the tiger before, the tiger said, Don't worry.
ja: Since the rabbit had once helped the tiger before, the tiger said, Don't worry.

en: I am stronger than the wolf and my roar is louder. The tiger roared fiercely in front of the cave.
zh: I am stronger than the wolf and my roar is louder. The tiger roared fiercely in front of the cave.
ja: I am stronger than the wolf and my roar is louder. The tiger roared fiercely in front of the cave.

en: But again, the same booming voice echoed. I am the one who breaks a rhino's bones and crushes
zh: But again, the same booming voice echoed. I am the one who breaks a rhino's bones and crushes
ja: But again, the same booming voice echoed. I am the one who breaks a rhino's bones and crushes

en: an elephant into dust. The tiger froze. His roar was nothing compared to the cave's echo.
zh: an elephant into dust. The tiger froze. His roar was nothing compared to the cave's echo.
ja: an elephant into dust. The tiger froze. His roar was nothing compared to the cave's echo.

en: He thought, If this creature can defeat rhinos and elephants, how will I survive?
zh: He thought, If this creature can defeat rhinos and elephants, how will I survive?
ja: He thought, If this creature can defeat rhinos and elephants, how will I survive?

en: And in a flash, he too ran away. Then came a rhino, stomping the ground in anger.
zh: And in a flash, he too ran away. Then came a rhino, stomping the ground in anger.
ja: And in a flash, he too ran away. Then came a rhino, stomping the ground in anger.

en: Who dares to insult my kind? He bellowed. The same terrifying voice replied from the cave.
zh: Who dares to insult my kind? He bellowed. The same terrifying voice replied from the cave.
ja: Who dares to insult my kind? He bellowed. The same terrifying voice replied from the cave.

en: Do you also want your bones broken like your brother?
zh: Do you also want your bones broken like your brother?
ja: Do you also want your bones broken like your brother?

en: The rhino began sweating in fear and quickly ran away. Finally, an elephant stepped forward.
zh: The rhino began sweating in fear and quickly ran away. Finally, an elephant stepped forward.
ja: The rhino began sweating in fear and quickly ran away. Finally, an elephant stepped forward.

en: But after hearing that awful voice, even the mighty elephant panicked.
zh: But after hearing that awful voice, even the mighty elephant panicked.
ja: But after hearing that awful voice, even the mighty elephant panicked.

en: And for the first time, the rabbit saw an elephant running away, faster than a tiger.
zh: And for the first time, the rabbit saw an elephant running away, faster than a tiger.
ja: And for the first time, the rabbit saw an elephant running away, faster than a tiger.

en: At this hopeless moment, a little frog hopped up. He asked, Shall I help you?
zh: At this hopeless moment, a little frog hopped up. He asked, Shall I help you?
ja: At this hopeless moment, a little frog hopped up. He asked, Shall I help you?

en: The rabbit told him everything. The wolf, the tiger, the rhino, even the elephant.
zh: The rabbit told him everything. The wolf, the tiger, the rhino, even the elephant.
ja: The rabbit told him everything. The wolf, the tiger, the rhino, even the elephant.

en: All ran away in fear. I doubt you can do it. The frog just smiled.
zh: All ran away in fear. I doubt you can do it. The frog just smiled.
ja: All ran away in fear. I doubt you can do it. The frog just smiled.

en: It doesn't matter if you doubt me. I still want to try all the animals who had run away
zh: It doesn't matter if you doubt me. I still want to try all the animals who had run away
ja: It doesn't matter if you doubt me. I still want to try all the animals who had run away

en: now returned secretly to watch. They wanted to see what was really inside the cave.
zh: now returned secretly to watch. They wanted to see what was really inside the cave.
ja: now returned secretly to watch. They wanted to see what was really inside the cave.

en: But none of them trusted the frog. The frog called out. Who is inside?
zh: But none of them trusted the frog. The frog called out. Who is inside?
ja: But none of them trusted the frog. The frog called out. Who is inside?

en: The terrifying voice echoed again. But the frog wasn't afraid. He went closer and shouted back,
zh: The terrifying voice echoed again. But the frog wasn't afraid. He went closer and shouted back,
ja: The terrifying voice echoed again. But the frog wasn't afraid. He went closer and shouted back,

en: come out and face me. This time, the creature inside got scared. It saw a huge shadow
zh: come out and face me. This time, the creature inside got scared. It saw a huge shadow
ja: come out and face me. This time, the creature inside got scared. It saw a huge shadow

en: and trembling. It slowly crept out of the cave. To everyone's shock. It was just a caterpillar.
zh: and trembling. It slowly crept out of the cave. To everyone's shock. It was just a caterpillar.
ja: and trembling. It slowly crept out of the cave. To everyone's shock. It was just a caterpillar.

en: Because of the cave's echo, its tiny voice had sounded like thunder. Instead of anger,
zh: Because of the cave's echo, its tiny voice had sounded like thunder. Instead of anger,
ja: Because of the cave's echo, its tiny voice had sounded like thunder. Instead of anger,

en: all the animals burst into laughter. They wondered how such a tiny creature had created such enormous

en: courage, just like the frog showed. Three, running away from problems, never solves them. As the
